knowledge_base_status_error_check.name: knowledge_base_status_error_check
knowledge_base_status_error_check.value:
(
          "knowledge_base"."status" = 'completed'
          AND "knowledge_base"."embedding_model_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "knowledge_base"."dimensions" IS NOT NULL
          AND "knowledge_base"."dimensions" > 0
          AND "knowledge_base"."error" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "knowledge_base"."status" = 'failed'
          AND "knowledge_base"."error" IS NOT NULL
          AND length(trim("knowledge_base"."error")) > 0
        )

knowledge_item_phase_check.name: knowledge_item_phase_check
knowledge_item_phase_check.value:
"knowledge_item"."phase" IS NULL
        OR ("knowledge_item"."type" IN ('file', 'url', 'note') AND "knowledge_item"."phase" IN ('reading', 'embedding'))
        OR ("knowledge_item"."type" IN ('directory', 'sitemap') AND "knowledge_item"."phase" = 'preparing')

knowledge_item_status_phase_error_check.name: knowledge_item_status_phase_error_check
knowledge_item_status_phase_error_check.value:
(
          "knowledge_item"."status" IN ('idle', 'completed')
          AND "knowledge_item"."phase" IS NULL
          AND "knowledge_item"."error" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          -- Containers may stay processing after their own prepare phase ends
          -- while descendant leaf items continue reading/embedding.
          "knowledge_item"."status" = 'processing'
          AND "knowledge_item"."error" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "knowledge_item"."status" = 'failed'
          AND "knowledge_item"."phase" IS NULL
          AND "knowledge_item"."error" IS NOT NULL
          AND length(trim("knowledge_item"."error")) > 0
        )
